faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: We have collected the most frequently asked questions about using the service.

items.question: How do I order?
items.answer: Leave detailed requirements on the contact page, and a representative will contact you after review.

items.question: How can I make the payment?
items.answer: We support various payment methods such as card payment and bank transfer.

items.question: How long does it take for production?
items.answer: It varies depending on the scale of the project, but usually takes 2 to 8 weeks.

items.question: Can I resell the products?
items.answer: Resale availability may vary depending on the license regulations. Please refer to the license page.

items.question: Where can I find shipping details?
items.answer: Digital products will be sent via email, and physical products can be checked on My Page.
